name: Mehet the Mirror Queen
dialogue: Three turns from now you will swap your front mon. I have seen this already.
Six turns from now you will reach for a heal. I have seen this too.
I am Mehet, and I do not play the game in front of me. I play the game three turns ahead.
Show me a move I haven't already counted.
preBattleLine: Mehet's mirror-shawl twists. A dozen of her stand at once, then five, then one.
postDefeatDialogue: Every mirror shatters at once. Mehet is left in the middle, breathing hard.
"You did something I didn't predict. That hasn't happened in two hundred years."
She presses a sliver of mirror into your hand. "Keep it. So I never lose your move again."
prereqBlockedMessage: Mehet's mirrors stay dark. "I have not seen your face in them yet. Return when the Pharaoh has shown me."
